title: Donald Trump focuses heavily on the upcoming 2026 midterm elections and conservative policy agendas. (唐纳德·特朗普重点关注即将到来的2026年中期选举和保守派政策议程。)
Recent May speeches highlight new economic proposals and his vision for international trade agreements. (五月份的近期演讲强调了新的经济提案以及他对国际贸易协定的愿景。)
The former president announces a massive new series of rallies across the Midwest this spring. (这位前总统宣布今年春天将在中西部举行一系列大规模的新集会。)
